name: Jalapeno Grilled Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add onion and garlic, then cook, stirring occasionally, for about 5 minutes or until the onion is tender.
3. Add catsup, vinegar, brown sugar, jalapeno peppers, salt, and mustard. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the mixture is blended.
4. Place the chicken, skin side up, on a prepared grill about 8 inches from the heat.
5. Grill, turning every 8 to 10 minutes, for about 40 minutes.
6. Brush the chicken with sauce, then grill, turning and basting with sauce every 5 minutes, for about 20 more minutes or until the chicken is fork-tender.
